title: Pumpkin's Custom Dungeonbreaker Texture Pack
description: A CIT Pack for hypixel skyblock item Dungeonbreaker
body:
A CIT Pack for hypixel skyblock item [Dungeonbreaker](https://wiki.hypixel.net/Dungeonbreaker) 

This pack requires [Optifine](https://optifine.net/home) or any CIT mod can load mcpatcher format on 1.8.9, and [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament) or [Variants-CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit) on 1.21.5+
